user.name: Ephrem Tamire
user.bio: Professional Graphics Designer specializing in brand identity, 3D visualization, and premium digital experiences.
user.title: Graphics Designer

education.description: I am a self-taught graphics designer who developed my skills through practice, online learning, and real-world projects. I focus on building strong visual communication through modern design principles.
I studied Computer Science at RAYA University, where I built a strong foundation in computing, problem-solving, and digital systems.
I completed professional training in Graphics Design, focusing on modern design tools and industry standards.
I trained in digital marketing to understand how design connects with business growth and online engagement.
I also trained in video editing to expand my creative skills into motion and visual storytelling.

experience.description: I work as a freelance graphics designer, creating visual content for individuals, businesses, and organizations. I help clients build strong visual identities through modern, clean, and impactful design solutions.

I worked as a graphic designer supporting the institution with visual content and promotional materials. This role helped me gain real institutional design experience and understand professional communication design.
I worked as a graphic designer supporting school communication and visual branding. This experience improved my ability to work in structured environments and deliver consistent professional designs.
tasks: Developed visual materials for students and staff

services.title: Brand Identity Design
services.desc: Creating unique and memorable visual identities for modern brands.
services.focus: Best for: Businesses, startups, personal brands

services.title: Social Media Design
services.desc: Engagement-driven post designs, stories, and covers for Instagram, FB, and TikTok.

services.title: Poster & Flyer Design
services.desc: Professional billboard, flyer, and web banner designs that demand attention.

services.title: Business Design Materials
services.desc: Professional corporate identity through high-quality print and digital materials.

services.title: Advertising Design
services.desc: Sales-driven creative visuals designed to convert and grow your business.

services.title: Custom Graphic Design
services.desc: Flexible creative services for unique client requests and custom design work.

projects.title: Cyberpunk Branding

messages.text:
Hello! I am the AI Assistant for Ephrem Tamire. While Ephrem is currently in the studio crafting some 3D masterpieces, I am here to help you with project inquiries and cost estimations. 

How can I assist you today? Are you looking for help with branding, 3D visualization, UI/UX design, or perhaps some motion graphics? ✨

Hello! I’m the AI assistant for Ephrem Tamire. Ephrem is currently busy creating some 3D masterpieces, but I’m here to help you with inquiries and project estimations.

Whether you're looking for a new brand identity, high-end 3D visualizations, UI/UX design, or motion graphics, I can provide you with a rough quote and details on how we work. 

How can I assist you with your project today? ✨
